2026-05-24 02:33:04.233 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (6ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']

            IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Accounts WHERE AccountCode = '1103')
            BEGIN
                DECLARE @CurrentAssetsId UNIQUEIDENTIFIER = (
                    SELECT Id FROM Accounts WHERE AccountCode = '11'
                );
                DECLARE @CurrencyId UNIQUEIDENTIFIER = (
                    SELECT TOP 1 Id FROM Currencies WHERE IsLocal = 1
                );
                IF @CurrentAssetsId IS NOT NULL AND @CurrencyId IS NOT NULL
                BEGIN
                    INSERT INTO Accounts (Id, AccountCode, AccountNameAr, AccountNameEn,
                                         AccountType, IsDetail, CurrencyId, ParentAccountId)
                    VALUES (NEWID(), '1103', N'المخزون', 'Inventory',
                            1, 0, @CurrencyId, @CurrentAssetsId);
                END
            END

SELECT [i0].[Id], [i0].[Barcode], [i0].[CategoryId], [i0].[DefaultPurchasePrice], [i0].[IsActive], [i0].[ItemCode], [i0].[ItemNameAr], [i0].[ItemNameEn], [i0].[MaximumQuantity], [i0].[MinimumQuantity], [i0].[ReorderLevel], [i0].[SafetyStockUnitId], [i0].[SalesPrice], [i0].[Sku], [i0].[StockGroupId], [s].[Id], [s].[CostOfGoodsSoldAccountId], [s].[GroupCode], [s].[GroupNameAr], [s].[GroupNameEn], [s].[InventoryAccountId], [s].[IsDetail], [s].[ParentGroupId], [s].[SalesAccountId], [c].[Id], [c].[NameAr], [c].[NameEn], [s0].[Id], [s0].[ConversionRate], [s0].[IsBaseUnit], [s0].[ItemId], [s0].[Price], [s0].[UnitId], [s0].[Id0], [s0].[NameAr], [s0].[NameEn], [s0].[ShortName]
FROM (
    SELECT [i].[Id], [i].[Barcode], [i].[CategoryId], [i].[DefaultPurchasePrice], [i].[IsActive], [i].[ItemCode], [i].[ItemNameAr], [i].[ItemNameEn], [i].[MaximumQuantity], [i].[MinimumQuantity], [i].[ReorderLevel], [i].[SafetyStockUnitId], [i].[SalesPrice], [i].[Sku], [i].[StockGroupId]
    FROM [Items] AS [i]
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [i0]
INNER JOIN [StockGroups] AS [s] ON [i0].[StockGroupId] = [s].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [i0].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i1].[Id], [i1].[ConversionRate], [i1].[IsBaseUnit], [i1].[ItemId], [i1].[Price], [i1].[UnitId], [u].[Id] AS [Id0], [u].[NameAr], [u].[NameEn], [u].[ShortName]
    FROM [ItemUnits] AS [i1]
    INNER JOIN [Units] AS [u] ON [i1].[UnitId] = [u].[Id]
) AS [s0] ON [i0].[Id] = [s0].[ItemId]
ORDER BY [i0].[Id], [s].[Id], [c].[Id], [s0].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT [j].[Id], [j].[CreatedAt], [j].[CreatedBy], [j].[Description], [j].[FiscalPeriodId], [j].[PostedAt], [j].[PostedBy], [j].[Status], [j].[TransactionDate], [j].[VoucherNumber]

    ORDER BY [j].[TransactionDate] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT [j0].[Id], [j0].[CreatedAt], [j0].[CreatedBy], [j0].[Description], [j0].[FiscalPeriodId], [j0].[PostedAt], [j0].[PostedBy], [j0].[Status], [j0].[TransactionDate], [j0].[VoucherNumber], [f].[Id], [f].[EndDate], [f].[IsClosed], [f].[StartDate], [f].[YearName], [j1].[Id], [j1].[AccountId], [j1].[CostCenterId], [j1].[Credit], [j1].[CurrencyId], [j1].[Debit], [j1].[ExchangeRate], [j1].[ForeignCredit], [j1].[ForeignDebit], [j1].[JournalEntryMasterId], [j1].[Memo]
FROM (
    SELECT [j].[Id], [j].[CreatedAt], [j].[CreatedBy], [j].[Description], [j].[FiscalPeriodId], [j].[PostedAt], [j].[PostedBy], [j].[Status], [j].[TransactionDate], [j].[VoucherNumber]
    FROM [JournalEntryMasters] AS [j]
    ORDER BY [j].[TransactionDate] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [j0]
INNER JOIN [FiscalPeriods] AS [f] ON [j0].[FiscalPeriodId] = [f].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [JournalEntryLines] AS [j1] ON [j0].[Id] = [j1].[JournalEntryMasterId]
ORDER BY [j0].[TransactionDate] DESC, [j0].[Id], [f].[Id]

2026-05-24 05:26:39.621 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (21ms) [Parameters=[@__p_0='?' (DbType = Int32), @__p_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [i0].[Id], [i0].[Barcode], [i0].[CategoryId], [i0].[DefaultPurchasePrice], [i0].[IsActive], [i0].[ItemCode], [i0].[ItemNameAr], [i0].[ItemNameEn], [i0].[MaximumQuantity], [i0].[MinimumQuantity], [i0].[ReorderLevel], [i0].[SafetyStockUnitId], [i0].[SalesPrice], [i0].[Sku], [i0].[StockGroupId], [s].[Id], [s].[CostOfGoodsSoldAccountId], [s].[GroupCode], [s].[GroupNameAr], [s].[GroupNameEn], [s].[InventoryAccountId], [s].[IsDetail], [s].[ParentGroupId], [s].[SalesAccountId], [c].[Id], [c].[NameAr], [c].[NameEn], [s0].[Id], [s0].[ConversionRate], [s0].[IsBaseUnit], [s0].[ItemId], [s0].[Price], [s0].[UnitId], [s0].[Id0], [s0].[NameAr], [s0].[NameEn], [s0].[ShortName]
FROM (
    SELECT [i].[Id], [i].[Barcode], [i].[CategoryId], [i].[DefaultPurchasePrice], [i].[IsActive], [i].[ItemCode], [i].[ItemNameAr], [i].[ItemNameEn], [i].[MaximumQuantity], [i].[MinimumQuantity], [i].[ReorderLevel], [i].[SafetyStockUnitId], [i].[SalesPrice], [i].[Sku], [i].[StockGroupId]
    FROM [Items] AS [i]
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [i0]
INNER JOIN [StockGroups] AS [s] ON [i0].[StockGroupId] = [s].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [i0].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i1].[Id], [i1].[ConversionRate], [i1].[IsBaseUnit], [i1].[ItemId], [i1].[Price], [i1].[UnitId], [u].[Id] AS [Id0], [u].[NameAr], [u].[NameEn], [u].[ShortName]
    FROM [ItemUnits] AS [i1]
    INNER JOIN [Units] AS [u] ON [i1].[UnitId] = [u].[Id]
) AS [s0] ON [i0].[Id] = [s0].[ItemId]

) AS [i0]

LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [i0].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT [i].[Id], [i].[Barcode], [i].[CategoryId], [i].[DefaultPurchasePrice], [i].[IsActive], [i].[ItemCode], [i].[ItemNameAr], [i].[ItemNameEn], [i].[MaximumQuantity], [i].[MinimumQuantity], [i].[ReorderLevel], [i].[SafetyStockUnitId], [i].[SalesPrice], [i].[Sku], [i].[StockGroupId]
    FROM [Items] AS [i]
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [i0]
INNER JOIN [StockGroups] AS [s] ON [i0].[StockGroupId] = [s].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [i0].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i1].[Id], [i1].[ConversionRate], [i1].[IsBaseUnit], [i1].[ItemId], [i1].[Price], [i1].[UnitId], [u].[Id] AS [Id0], [u].[NameAr], [u].[NameEn], [u].[ShortName]
    FROM [ItemUnits] AS [i1]
    INNER JOIN [Units] AS [u] ON [i1].[UnitId] = [u].[Id]
) AS [s0] ON [i0].[Id] = [s0].[ItemId]
ORDER BY [i0].[Id], [s].[Id], [c].[Id], [s0].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT [j].[Id], [j].[CreatedAt], [j].[CreatedBy], [j].[Description], [j].[FiscalPeriodId], [j].[PostedAt], [j].[PostedBy], [j].[Status], [j].[TransactionDate], [j].[VoucherNumber]
    FROM [JournalEntryMasters] AS [j]
    ORDER BY [j].[TransactionDate] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [j0]
INNER JOIN [FiscalPeriods] AS [f] ON [j0].[FiscalPeriodId] = [f].[Id]

SELECT [j0].[Id], [j0].[CreatedAt], [j0].[CreatedBy], [j0].[Description], [j0].[FiscalPeriodId], [j0].[PostedAt], [j0].[PostedBy], [j0].[Status], [j0].[TransactionDate], [j0].[VoucherNumber], [f].[Id], [f].[EndDate], [f].[IsClosed], [f].[StartDate], [f].[YearName], [j1].[Id], [j1].[AccountId], [j1].[CostCenterId], [j1].[Credit], [j1].[CurrencyId], [j1].[Debit], [j1].[ExchangeRate], [j1].[ForeignCredit], [j1].[ForeignDebit], [j1].[JournalEntryMasterId], [j1].[Memo]
FROM (
    SELECT [j].[Id], [j].[CreatedAt], [j].[CreatedBy], [j].[Description], [j].[FiscalPeriodId], [j].[PostedAt], [j].[PostedBy], [j].[Status], [j].[TransactionDate], [j].[VoucherNumber]
    FROM [JournalEntryMasters] AS [j]
    ORDER BY [j].[TransactionDate] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [j0]
INNER JOIN [FiscalPeriods] AS [f] ON [j0].[FiscalPeriodId] = [f].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [JournalEntryLines] AS [j1] ON [j0].[Id] = [j1].[JournalEntryMasterId]
ORDER BY [j0].[TransactionDate] DESC, [j0].[Id], [f].[Id]
